visual: Feet parallel shoulder-width apart, arms hanging softly at the sides, body relaxed and upright — the neutral pre-form standing posture.
motion_description: The person maintains a still, upright standing posture with feet planted parallel and shoulder-width apart, distributing weight evenly across both legs. The arms hang relaxed down the sides of the body, held slightly separated from the torso, with hands resting around hip level and palms facing backward. The posture is held continuously with no stepping, body rotation, or weight shifting throughout the clip.
